message:
fix(fwc): use checked_add for audit chain seq to detect overflow

The FWC verify_chain used saturating_add(1) which silently accepts a
stalled chain at u64::MAX. The fcp-audit library explicitly warns
against this and uses checked_add instead. Align the FWC CLI with the
library semantics: report audit.seq_overflow and stop validation when
the sequence counter can no longer be incremented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
